market_pulse: EDC Week dominates Vegas nightlife with LIV, Zouk, and TAO Beach commanding talent lineups; competitors leverage countdown content and flash promos aggressively.

content_gaps.description: Competitors (OMNIA, Zouk, TAO Beach, Hakkasan) deploying behind-the-scenes prep and countdown content; LIV has lineup posts but minimal story-driven narrative around the experience.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Deploy hourly story countdowns with artist intros, crew behind-the-scenes, and guest testimonials through Friday-Sunday EDC peak

content_gaps.description: XS and OMNIA actively tagging creators in promo posts; LIV talent posts lack direct influencer call-outs or remix-ready content angles.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Tag micro-influencers (5K-50K followers) in nightlife reels; create remix/reaction templates for TikTok creators

content_gaps.description: Palm Tree Beach Club and Zouk using interactive AR stickers; LIV stories lack gamified entry/check-in elements.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create Insta-branded check-in sticker for next venue opening or major event

influencer_activity.mention: Posted honest review of LIV Nightclub as guest list attendee; 591 likes, strong engagement on nightlife/EDM content; positioned LIV favorably vs. competitors.
Mentioned in LIV Beach posts for upcoming Friday feature; popular nightlife creator with disco/house focus.

liv_outreach_targets.reason: Already posted positive LIV Nightclub review; high-engagement nightlife creator; ripe for guest list + VIP partnership
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_action: Send VIP access for tomorrow night (5/15) with DJ lineup highlight

liv_outreach_targets.reason: Confirmed appearance Friday at LIV Beach; established audience of 50K+ followers; leverage for cross-promotion
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_action: Coordinate story takeover or live DJ set snippet for LIV main TikTok Friday evening

story_activity.summary: EDC Week lineup announced: Josh Baker B2B Kettama B2B Prospa (Wed 5/13), Dom Dolla (Thurs 5/14), Tiësto (Fri 5/15), Four Color Zack (Sat 5/16), David Guetta (Mon 5/18).
Dayclub talent confirmed: Knock2Music (Thurs 5/14), Discolines (Fri 5/15), David Guetta (Sat 5/16), John Summit (Sun 5/17).
May lineup released: Ray Volpe (Wed 5/13), James Hype + Meduza (Thurs 5/14), Wax Motif (Fri 5/15), DJ Baby Face NYC + DJ Adoni (Sun 5/17). EDC Week focus.
EDC Week talent: Yo Yo Lie (5/5), Deorro (5/8), Cedric Gervais (5/9), Deseo Latin Sundays (5/10), Mikey Francis (5/12).
EDC Week dayclub lineup: Porter Robinson (Thurs 5/14), DJ Snake + Roz Music (Fri 5/15), TAO Beach Saturday Party (Sat 5/16), Steve Aoki (Sun 5/17). Doors 11 AM daily.
Weekly lineup: Steve Aoki (Sat), DJ Lema (Sun). MGM Grand venue, recently opened by Tao Group + Kygo collab.
May hip-hop takeover: Big X Tha Plug (4/25), Jermaine Dupri (4/19), Tyga (5/2, 5/31, 6/28, 7/26, 8/9, 9/4). Upscale dress code enforced.

venues.summary: EDC Week dominance with 5-night lineup (Josh Baker, Dom Dolla, Tiësto, Four Color Zack, David Guetta); Instagram active with 88K followers, strong engagement.
